title: PrettyPigeon
description: a fabric 1.21.1 mod that adds pigeons
body:
# PrettyPigeon 1.21.1
PrettyPigeon adds multiple cute & fashion little pigeons that follows you.\
as of now there's:

- 7 natural pigeon variants based on real life pigeons:
> -The Rock Dove\
> -The Carneau\
> -The Australian Saddleback Tumbler\
> -The Pink-Necked Green Pigeon\
> -The Luzon Bleeding-Heart\
> -The Wompoo Fruit Dove\
> -The Sombre Pigeon

- Multiple hats you can give to tamed pigeon

- 3 mutated pigeon variants based on vanilla dimensions:
> -The Crimson (the catalyst is a crimson fungus)\
> -The Warped (the catalyst is a warped fungus)\
> -The Ender (the catalyst is a dragon's breath)

- 2 mutated variants for compatible mods:
- The Toad (from [Ribbits](https://modrinth.com/mod/ribbits))
- The Bumble (from [The Bumblezone](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-bumblezone-fabric))

And plenty more!
